body: # Purpose Fix the `noise_learn = false` bug greatly underpredicting uncertainty. In Lorenz example, the following two should be similar. with `noise_learn=false` and `true`: co-author with @lm2612 # In this PR - Initial bugfix to correct the regularization noise vs white kernel - Tightened runtests thanks to improved prediction, - new `alg_reg_noise` optional argument to GP to set the regularization when `noise_learn=true` (removing `magic_number`) - Lorenz example - with `SKLJL()` option
title: GP bug for noise_learn = false underprediction of uncertainty
